nasb.text: Our soul is greatly filled With the scoffing of those who are at ease, And with the contempt of the proud.

esv.text: Our soul has had more than enough of the scorn of those who are at ease, of the contempt of the proud.

cnv.text: 我們飽受那些安逸的人的嘲笑， 和驕傲的人的藐視，到了極點。

ccb.text: 我们饱受富足人的嘲弄、骄傲人的鄙视。

csbs.text: 安逸人的嘲笑和高慢人的藐视， 我们实在受尽了。
